purpose: First COMSOL/CST ranking check before deeper GA/BPSO/topology optimization.

platform.core: 3 um Au / 3 um gap / 3 um Au CPS

locked_template_requirement: All four masks must use identical geometry extents, material properties, ports, boundaries, mesh rules, and frequency sweep.

entries.name: B0_straight_cps
entries.validation_question: Does full-wave S21/S11 preserve the fast-model ranking?

entries.name: B1_traditional_stepped_bessel_cps
entries.rationale: Traditional analog baseline: hand-synthesized stepped-impedance/Bessel-like CPS on the same platform.
entries.validation_question: Does full-wave S21/S11 preserve the fast-model ranking?

entries.name: B2_7_stub_seed
entries.rationale: Initial seed: f3dB near 0.8 THz in ABCD.
entries.validation_question: Does full-wave S21/S11 preserve the fast-model ranking?

entries.name: B3_11_stub_sweep_best
entries.rationale: Current best fast-model candidate: stronger stopband than 7-stub seed.
entries.validation_question: Does full-wave S21/S11 preserve the fast-model ranking?
